what: Interact with the US Senate Lobbying Disclosure API
title: Interact with the US Senate Lobbying Disclosure API
text: lobby provides access US Senate’s Lobbying Disclosure Act API.

title: Interact with the US Senate Lobbying Disclosure API
text: can install development version lobby like :

title: Interact with the US Senate Lobbying Disclosure API
text: get filings, simply use lob_list_filings() function list filings match criteria. example, get filings Harvard University 2025: can also request next set using lob_request_next() function. , also artificially shorten results 3 per page. get details, can retrieve specific filing UUID using lob_retrieve_filing(): Similar endpoints exist clients, lobbyists, registrants, contributions. can look constants can used filtering using lob_constants_*() functions.
code: library(lobby) lob_list_filings(client_name = 'Harvard University', filing_year = 2025) #> # A tibble: 6 × 30 #>   url      filing_uuid filing_type filing_type_display filing_year filing_period #>   <chr>    <chr>       <chr>       <chr>                     <int> <chr>         #> 1 https:/… 0463abad-8… Q1          1st Quarter - Repo…        2025 first_quarter #> 2 https:/… fbe714ff-3… Q1          1st Quarter - Repo…        2025 first_quarter #> 3 https:/… 785c0620-7… Q2          2nd Quarter - Repo…        2025 second_quart… #> 4 https:/… 761c6e5a-f… Q2          2nd Quarter - Repo…        2025 second_quart… #> 5 https:/… 937d9dc1-c… Q3          3rd Quarter - Repo…        2025 third_quarter #> 6 https:/… b9247859-4… Q3          3rd Quarter - Repo…        2025 third_quarter #> # ℹ 24 more variables: filing_period_display <chr>, filing_document_url <chr>, #> #   filing_document_content_type <chr>, income <chr>, expenses <chr>, #> #   expenses_method <chr>, expenses_method_display <chr>, posted_by_name <chr>, #> #   dt_posted <chr>, termination_date <lgl>, registrant_country <chr>, #> #   registrant_ppb_country <lgl>, registrant_address_1 <chr>, #> #   registrant_address_2 <lgl>, registrant_different_address <lgl>, #> #   registrant_city <chr>, registrant_state <chr>, registrant_zip <chr>, … lob_list_filings(   client_name = 'Harvard University',   filing_year = 2025,   page_size = 3 ) |>   lob_request_next() #> # A tibble: 6 × 30 #>   url      filing_uuid filing_type filing_type_display filing_year filing_period #>   <chr>    <chr>       <chr>       <chr>                     <int> <chr>         #> 1 https:/… 0463abad-8… Q1          1st Quarter - Repo…        2025 first_quarter #> 2 https:/… fbe714ff-3… Q1          1st Quarter - Repo…        2025 first_quarter #> 3 https:/… 785c0620-7… Q2          2nd Quarter - Repo…        2025 second_quart… #> 4 https:/… 761c6e5a-f… Q2          2nd Quarter - title: Interact with the US Senate Lobbying Disclosure API
text: sign API key, visit US Senate’s Lobbying Disclosure Act API sign-website. key, can set environment USSLDA_KEY. can: Add directly .Renviron file line like , recommend using usethis::edit_r_environ() ensure open correct .Renviron file. Set current R session Sys.setenv(USSLDA_KEY='yourkey'). Set using lobby::set_lobby_key() function. save future sessions, run install = TRUE.

title: List Lobbying Filings — lob_list_clients
List Lobbying Filings — lob_list_clients
code: lob_list_clients(   client_country = NULL,   client_name = NULL,   client_ppb_country = NULL,   client_ppb_state = NULL,   client_state = NULL,   id = NULL,   ordering = NULL,   page = NULL,   page_size = NULL,   registrant_id = NULL,   registrant_name = NULL,   clean = TRUE )

title: List Lobbying Filings — lob_list_clients
text: client_country Client Country. "US" "CA". client_name Client Name. String value. client_ppb_country Client PPB Country. "US" "CA". client_ppb_state Client PPB State. "AL" "AK". client_state Client State. "AL" "AK". id ID. Integer value. ordering field use ordering results. String value. page page number within paginated result set. Integer value. page_size Number results return per page. Integer value. registrant_id Registrant ID. Integer value. registrant_name Registrant Name. String value. clean Default TRUE. output returned tibble (TRUE) list.

code: lob_list_contributions(   contribution_amount_max = NULL,   contribution_amount_min = NULL,   contribution_contributor = NULL,   contribution_date_after = NULL,   contribution_date_before = NULL,   contribution_honoree = NULL,   contribution_payee = NULL,   contribution_type = NULL,   filing_dt_posted_after = NULL,   filing_dt_posted_before = NULL,   filing_period = NULL,   filing_type = NULL,   filing_uuid = NULL,   filing_year = NULL,   lobbyist_exclude = NULL,   lobbyist_id = NULL,   lobbyist_name = NULL,   ordering = NULL,   page = NULL,   page_size = NULL,   registrant_id = NULL,   registrant_name = NULL,   clean = TRUE )

title: List Contribution Reports — lob_list_contributions
text: contribution_amount_max Contribution Amount Range. Float value. contribution_amount_min Contribution Amount Range. Float value. contribution_contributor Contribution Contributor Name. String value. contribution_date_after Contribution Date Range (/ ): yyyy-mm-dd. Date value. contribution_date_before Contribution Date Range (/ ): yyyy-mm-dd. Date value. contribution_honoree Contribution Honoree Name. String value. contribution_payee Contribution Payee Name. String value. contribution_type Contribution Type. "feca", "", "", "ple", "pic". filing_dt_posted_after Filing Date Posted Range (/ ): yyyy-mm-dd. Date-time value. filing_dt_posted_before Filing Date Posted Range (/ ): yyyy-mm-dd. Date-time value. filing_period Filing Period. "first_quarter", "second_quarter", "third_quarter", "fourth_quarter", "mid_year", "year_end". filing_type Filing Type. "RR", "RA", "Q1", "Q1Y", "1T", "1TY". filing_uuid filing_uuid. UUID value. filing_year Filing Year. 2025, 2024, 2023. lobbyist_exclude Exclude reports filed lobbyists. Boolean value. lobbyist_id Lobbyist ID. Integer value. lobbyist_name Lobbyist Name. String value. ordering field use ordering results. String value. page page number within paginated result set. Integer value. page_size Number results return per page. Integer value. registrant_id Registrant ID. Integer value. registrant_name Registrant Name. String value. clean Default TRUE. output returned tibble (TRUE) list.

title: List Contribution Reports — lob_list_contributions
List Contribution Reports — lob_list_contributions

title: List Lobbying Filings — lob_list_filings
text: affiliated_organization_country Affiliated Organization Country. "US" "CA". affiliated_organization_listed_indicator Affiliated Organizations Listed. Boolean value. affiliated_organization_name Affiliated Organization Name. String value. client_country Client Country. "US" "CA". client_id Client ID. Integer value. client_name Client Name. String value. client_ppb_country Client PPB Country. "US" "CA". client_ppb_state Client PPB State. "AL" "AK". client_state Client State. "AL" "AK". filing_amount_reported_max Filing Amount Reported Range (Min / Max). Float value. filing_amount_reported_min Filing Amount Reported Range (Min / Max). Float value. filing_dt_posted_after Filing Date Posted Range (/ ): yyyy-mm-dd. Date-time value. filing_dt_posted_before Filing Date Posted Range (/ ): yyyy-mm-dd. Date-time value. filing_period Filing Period. "first_quarter", "second_quarter", "third_quarter", "fourth_quarter", "mid_year", "year_end". filing_specific_lobbying_issues Filing Specific Lobbying Issues (Supports Advanced Text Searching). String value. filing_type Filing Type. "RR", "RA", "Q1", "Q1Y", "1T", "1TY". filing_uuid filing_uuid. UUID value. filing_year Filing Year. 2025, 2024, 2023. foreign_entity_country Foreign Entity Country. "US" "CA". foreign_entity_listed_indicator Foreign Entities Listed. Boolean value. foreign_entity_name Foreign Entity Name. String value. foreign_entity_ownership_percentage_max Foreign Entity Ownership Percentage. String value. foreign_entity_ownership_percentage_min Foreign Entity Ownership Percentage. String value. foreign_entity_ppb_country Foreign Entity PPB Country. "US" "CA". lobbyist_conviction_date_range_after Lobbyist Conviction Date Range (/ ): yyyy-mm-dd. Date value. lobbyist_conviction_date_range_before Lobbyist Conviction Date Range (/ ): yyyy-mm-dd. Date value. lobbyist_conviction_disclosure Lobbyist Conviction Description (Supports Advanced Text Searching). String value. lobbyist_conviction_disclosure_indicator Lobbyist Disclosed Conviction(s). Boolean value. lobbyist_covered_position Lobbyist Covered Position (Supports Advanced Text Searching). String value. lobbyist_covered_position_indicator Covered Government Position(s). Boolean value. lobbyist_id Lobbyist ID. Integer value. lobbyist_name Lobbyist Name. String value. ordering field use ordering results. String value. page page number within paginated result set. Integer value. page_size Number results return per page. Integer value. registrant_country Registrant Country. "US" "CA". registrant_id Registrant ID. Integer value. registrant_name Registrant Name. String value. registrant_ppb_country Registrant PPB Country. "US" "CA". clean Default TRUE. output returned tibble (TRUE) list.

what: lobby: Interact with the US Senate Lobbying Disclosure API — lobby-package
title: lobby: Interact with the US Senate Lobbying Disclosure API — lobby-package
text: Download read data lobbying United States Congress. Data queried Senate's Application Programming Interface (https://lda.senate.gov/api/). supports filings since 2008. Functions exist primary data endpoints, including queries filings, contributions, registrations, clients, lobbyists.

title: lobby: Interact with the US Senate Lobbying Disclosure API — lobby-package
Add Entry to Renviron — set_lobby_key
text: Adds US Senate Lobbying Disclosure API key .Renviron.

title: Add Entry to Renviron — set_lobby_key
code: set_lobby_key(key, overwrite = FALSE, install = FALSE, r_env = NULL)  lob_set_key(key, overwrite = FALSE, install = FALSE, r_env = NULL)

title: Add Entry to Renviron — set_lobby_key
text: key Character. API key add add. overwrite Defaults FALSE. Boolean. existing USSLDA_KEY Renviron overwritten? install Defaults FALSE. Boolean. added '~/.Renviron' file? r_env Path install install TRUE.

title: Add Entry to Renviron — set_lobby_key
Add Entry to Renviron — set_lobby_key
code: example_env <- tempfile(fileext = '.Renviron') set_lobby_key('1234', r_env = example_env) # r_env should likely be: file.path(Sys.getenv('HOME'), '.Renviron')
